intro: Apium graveolens, commonly known as celery seed tea, is a herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. The tea is made from the seeds of the celery plant, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. Drinking celery seed tea may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, menstrual cramps, and other conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
